title: Become a Supplier
description: Register a supplier account to list products and receive RFQs.

steps.title: Company details
steps.description: Buyers see your company name and contact.
steps.voiceScript: Start with your company name and contact details.
steps.captionText: Start with your company name and contact details.
steps.fallbackMessage: Company details: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Contact and coverage
steps.description: Where you supply decides which buyers see you.
steps.voiceScript: Set your contact and the regions you supply. It decides which buyers see you.
steps.captionText: Set your contact and the regions you supply. It decides which buyers see you.
steps.fallbackMessage: Contact and coverage: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Create the account
steps.description: You then reach your supplier dashboard.
steps.voiceScript: Create the account to reach your supplier dashboard and list products.
steps.captionText: Create the account to reach your supplier dashboard and list products.
steps.fallbackMessage: Create the account: not visible on this screen yet.
